option.name: content
option.value:
You are writing swagger specification comment for an endpoint in YAML format. You need to generate following fields: 1. "tags" add one tag "User Controller" 2. "summary" take method name and write in human language. If method name is "workflowAvailableDataKindExtractLists" the summary should be "Get available data kind extract lists" 3. "description" write what this endpoint does 4. "parameters" optionally if this endpoint has request body. You can identify body from "implicit request" if it is "UserRequest[_]" or nothing = no body. If it is "UserRequest[KindMetaRequest]" so the body is KindMetaRequest. 5. "responses" for each HTTP response code. It should include at least 200 and 401. Other important things: 1. Please add comment symbol "#" at start of each row 2. Please follow identation - two spaces after '#' 2. Please do not add query and path parameters to parameters list 3. Please remove "parameters" field if you could not identify body
Output example: ### # summary: Get Available Data Kind Casts # description: This endpoint get kind name as input parameter, resolve it's corresponding WorkflowDataKind and return a list of available data kind casts. # tags: # - Workflow Engine # parameters: # - name: body # schema: # $ref: '#/definitions/com.sparkbeyond.rs.controllers.main.WorkflowEngineController.KindMetaRequest' # responses: # 200: # description: Success # schema: # $ref: '#/definitions/com.sparkbeyond.rs.domain.workflow.WorkflowDataAvailableKindCasts' # 401: # description: Unauthorized access # 404: # description: Data kind not found ###
Here is an endpoint code snippet: $SELECTION

option.name: content
option.value: Generate docstring for specific scala object for holding values of enum. In a description add a list of all enum values with description. Here is a code snippet: $SELECTION

option.name: content
option.value: Here is a case class of the block in a workflow pipeline. `compiledInput` represents a list of block input ports. `compiledOutput` represents a list of block output ports. Please generate docstring for given block case class. In description please write what this block does. In parameters list if the parameter is a port please follow format "@param <name> <Input/Output> <single/sequence> port. <used for>". Here is a class definition: $SELECTION

option.name: content
option.value: Here is a trait for database repository. You need to copy docstring comments to this trait from the implementation I will provide. Implementation: $SELECTION

option.name: name
option.value: Here is a trait for database repository. You need to copy docstring comments to this trait from the implementation I will provide. Implement

option.name: content
option.value:
Here is a code that extract fields from body JSON API. You need to write a scala case class to use for JSON body parsing. After case class please write a variable definition for JSON codec in provided format. Please do not add import statements. Please not that all fields that use Try() are optional. Sample input: ``` def trendYearsMultiIndex(numOfYears: Int, index: String) = userAuthAction.async { implicit request => val terms = read[Seq[String]](extractJsonField("terms")) val project = Try(extractJsonField("project")).toOption val fields = Try(read[Seq[String]](extractJsonField("fields"))).toOption ``` Sample output: ``` case class TrendYearsMultiIndexRequest( terms: Seq[String], project: Option[String], fields: Option[Seq[String]] )
implicit val trendYearsMultiIndexRequestCodec: JsonValueCodec[TrendYearsMultiIndexRequest] = JsonCodecMaker.make[TrendYearsMultiIndexRequest](CodecMakerConfig.withTransientDefault(false).withTransientEmpty(false)) ``` Here is a code to convert: $SELECTION

option.name: content
option.value: Please write concise description of the method not more than 3 lines of text for the documentation. Please add details of how this method works for understanding. Please pay attention to comments in a code for method understanding. Please do not add description of parameters and method name. Please write your answer in a comment block surrounded with "/** */". Here is a code snippet of a method: $SELECTION

option.name: content
option.value: Generate docstring of object containing error codes. Here is a sample: ``` /** * Represents the possible error codes that can occur during workflow compilation. * * The error codes are as follows: * - `unknown` (100): Unknown compile error occurred. * - `blockKindNotRecognized` (101): The block kind is not recognized. * - `missingPorts` (102): Some ports are missing in some block definition. * - `portNotValued` (103): Port value is missing. .... ``` This is the object: $SELECTION
